title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at NHB

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at NHB
jsonLd.description:
NHB, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NHB:
NHB is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB!
